overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The character moves from an outdoor market pathway through grand columned entrances and into inner courtyards with hieroglyphic walls, illuminated by moonlight and torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market pathway with palm trees

events.description: character briefly slows while passing a torch-lit market stall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market pathway toward the temple complex ahead

notable_agents.action: civilian walking away from the camera toward the left side of the path

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the pathway
white fabric banners stretched between poles overhead
wooden stall with fabric roof and lattice fencing
large stone sphinx statue visible in the distance
massive stone columns marking the temple entrance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an outdoor market pathway at night, lined with palm trees and wooden stalls. The hooded protagonist walks forward along a dirt trail, passing by a torch-lit stall on the right. Fabric canopies stretch overhead, and massive temple columns become visible in the distance as the character approaches the temple complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple entrance with monumental columns

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to paved stone as character approaches the temple columns
character passes between two massive decorated pillars with blue and gold patterns

agents.ego_description: walking toward the grand temple entrance, passing between massive stone columns

notable_agents.action: civilian walking across the temple courtyard from left to right

entered.detail: massive cylindrical pillars with blue and gold chevron patterns and lit braziers
large stone elephant statue with decorative blankets and flowers
wide stone staircase leading up to the inner temple

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the grand temple entrance, walking on paved stone ground between massive decorated pillars. The scene opens up into a wide plaza with an elephant statue and stone stairs leading upward. The fabric canopies continue overhead, and the architecture shifts from market stalls to monumental stone architecture.

events.description: character enters a narrow enclosed corridor with hieroglyphic-covered walls
exiting the narrow corridor into a more open lit courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow hieroglyphic corridor and emerging into an inner courtyard

entered.detail: stone walls covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures
large decorative stone vase with plants
open courtyard area with stone paving and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor flanked by walls covered in detailed Egyptian hieroglyphics. The space becomes enclosed with limited sky visibility, lit by wall-mounted torches. After passing through the corridor, the character emerges into an inner courtyard with stone stairs visible to the left and more temple structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with stone architecture

events.description: character turns slightly right while navigating the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the inner temple courtyard, examining the surrounding stone architecture

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with colorful striped trim and hieroglyphic details
tall rectangular stone pillars with decorative capitals

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the inner temple courtyard, surrounded by decorated stone buildings and pillars. The space is more open than the corridor but still enclosed by temple architecture. Stone stairs lead up to a higher level on the left, while the character continues forward through the paved courtyard toward more structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling nighttime market pathway into the secluded, monumental depths of an ancient Egyptian temple. It begins on a dirt trail lined with palm trees and torch-lit wooden stalls, moving forward as fabric canopies overhead give way to the sight of massive columns in the distance. As the character reaches the temple entrance, the terrain shifts from dirt to paved stone, opening into a wide plaza featuring an elephant statue and grand pillars. The scene then narrows into an enclosed corridor flanked by walls of detailed hieroglyphics and flickering torches before emerging once more into a spacious inner courtyard. Finally, the camera glides past decorated stone buildings and ascending stairs, continuing deeper into the heart of the temple complex.
